benchmarks.name: extract_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure packed-word bitfield extraction over aligned u64 staged input
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates BITFIELD_EXTRACT lowering using native loads and constant shift-and-mask fields

benchmarks.name: bitfield_extract
benchmarks.description: Packed-word bitfield extraction over staged two-word records
benchmarks.hypothesis: Repeated constant shift-and-mask extracts should reward compact canonical extract lowering over packed inputs

benchmarks.name: endian_swap_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure aligned load plus byte-swap sequence over staged u32 input
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates ENDIAN_FUSION lowering by using native aligned loads followed by __builtin_bswap32
